neptune.dbcluster.dbclusterrole.FeatureN.Docs: The name of the feature associated with the Amazon Identity and Access Management (IAM) role. For the list of supported feature names, see [DescribeDBEngineVersions](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/neptune/latest/userguide/api-other-apis.html#DescribeDBEngineVersions).

neptune.dbcluster.dbclusterrole.RoleArn.Docs: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the IAM role that is associated with the DB cluster.
